title: Torches 'n' Trinkets
description: Adds new items to allow you to wear torches and lanterns on your hip!
body:
A small and simple mod to add a new trinket slot for torch and lantern belts with dynamic lighting!

### Make sure you download [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets), [Radiant Gear](https://modrinth.com/mod/radiant-gear) and [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) otherwise the mod is useless.


## This mod adds 3 new items:

### Torch Belt:
- A new item placeable in the new "Lights" trinket slot to add the same lighting as holding a regular torch in your offhand would, but on your hip! To help free up your offhand and still give you some light.
### Lantern Belt:
- A new item placeable in the new "Lights" trinket slot to add the same lighting as holding a regular lantern in your offhand would, but on your hip! To help free up your offhand and still give you some light. (has a slightly higher luminance than the torch)
### Soul Lantern Belt:
- A new item placeable in the new "Lights" trinket slot to add the same lighting as holding a regular torch in your offhand would, but on your hip! To help free up your offhand and still give you some light. (has a lower luminance than both the torch and lantern but is good for mood lighting, also it looks cool)

Open an issue on my [github](https://github.com/bigmanmad/torchesntrinkets-1.20.1) or DM me on discord for help/suggestions: goremann
